note: SEEDED KNOWN-BAD (P3, caution.md C-027). A CMS serves its privacy policy at a query-string URL (/privacy?page_id=42). The old _discoverLinks dropped any href containing '?', so the policy page was never crawled and an absence finding fired on unread content. The crawler must crawl the query-string page. Consumed by evidence/crawler/crawl.test.js.

pages.https://querysite.example/:
